# Synology DSM syslog fixture — REAL captured + LABELED-SYNTHETIC samples.
#
# Source (REAL): live Synology DS3622xs+, DSM 7.3.2-86009, captured via host
#   UDP listener 0.0.0.0:5515 on 2026-06-27 (DSM Log Center -> Log Sending ->
#   192.168.2.148:5515 UDP, BSD format). Real datagrams persisted from the
#   session capture.
# Format: RFC 3164 (BSD). Every line "<PRI>Mmm dd HH:MM:SS NAS CATEGORY[: ]msg".
#   PRI=14 (facility=1/user, severity=6/info) for ALL lines -> bucket by the
#   CATEGORY WORD, not facility. Delimiter is inconsistent: "Connection:" has a
#   colon; "System Test message" is space-delimited.
# Secrets/PII on-wire (bracket/paren wrapped): User [<name>] ; from [<addr>] ;
#   via [<method>] ; from (<ipv4>). Redaction patterns synology_* cover these.
#
# === REAL (live-captured 2026-06-27) ===
# System (test heartbeat, space-delimited) -> synology-system
<14>Jun 27 09:13:46 NAS System Test message from Synology Syslog Client from (70.229.192.120)
# Connection (DSM login, colon-delimited; note IPv6 in from [...]) -> synology-auth
<14>Jun 27 09:19:40 NAS Connection: User [jakekausler] from [2600:387:15:700e::8] signed in to [DSM] successfully via [amfa-email].
#
# === SYNTHETIC (pending real capture — Build/Refinement MUST confirm the exact
#     category words against a richer live capture; see the stage Re-confirm list)
# Storage Manager (SMART/storage) -> synology-smart  [SYNTHETIC]
<14>Jun 27 10:00:00 NAS Storage Manager: [Storage Pool 1] SMART warning detected on disk 3.
# Package Center (package event) -> synology-package  [SYNTHETIC]
<14>Jun 27 10:01:00 NAS Package Center: Package [Docker] has been updated to version 24.0.2.
# Backup (recognized-else -> synology-system)  [SYNTHETIC]
<14>Jun 27 10:02:00 NAS Backup: scheduled Hyper Backup task completed successfully.
# Connection failed-login (auth, colon-delimited)  [SYNTHETIC]
<14>Jun 27 10:03:00 NAS Connection: User [jakekausler] from [192.168.2.50] failed to sign in to [DSM] via [password].
